description: Add a notification center with read state, filtering, and clear-read actions.

userStories.title: Persisting notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want read state stored so that notification state survives across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread and read values are stored per notification.

userStories.title: Showing notification list and unread badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want a notification list and unread badge so that I can see new activity quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread notifications show an unread badge.
Users can open the notification list.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Updating notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what I have seen.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can mark a notification read or unread.
State changes persist through the storage layer.

userStories.title: Filtering notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list filters by read and unread state.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clearing read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that I can keep the center tidy.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can clear all read notifications.
Unread notifications remain after the clear action.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
